name: Artichoke Extract
summary: Decision-ready summary: Artichoke Extract is best framed for indigestion support; cholesterol context; bile-flow support; safety screen: bile duct obstruction; gallstones; ragweed allergy.
description: Artichoke Extract supports digestion; cholesterol; bile flow with moderate confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v8.2: A randomized placebo-controlled trial found HDL-cholesterol improvement in primary mild hypercholesterolemia.
claimMap.notes: v8.2: A randomized placebo-controlled trial found HDL-cholesterol improvement in primary mild hypercholesterolemia.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: artichoke leaf extract doses vary; 250–2700 mg/day has been used in human studies
